overview: Cleveland Men's Health provides urologic care focusing on male reproductive health and sexual dysfunction. Dr. Nannan Thirumavalavan is a fellowship-trained urologist specializing in male infertility, erectile dysfunction, low testosterone, vasectomy reversals, and penile implants.
highlights: Fellowship-trained in male reproductive medicine and microsurgery
Chief of Male Reproductive and Sexual Health at University Hospitals
Offers vasectomy reversals, penile implants, and sperm extraction
targetAudience: Men seeking treatment for male reproductive health, sexual dysfunction, and urologic conditions.
